textByHashes.074ab12e8b384fe47f4ae99105b6ac2e04b89f84: Yes? Can I help you with something?
textByHashes.e3bcb2af29042ab20eb371ede03ba1963d75a14f: We don't serve that sort of brew here, this is a high class establishment!
textByHashes.f6586d4def7aa667182260c958065213b02c2756: If you insist. You might want to try the Laughing Miner in East. If anyone is selling that, it would be them.
textByHashes.75ee68dc1abdb145fc8a85c53371f5e7f0860315: But I doubt it. Kelda stout is very rare these days. Fortunately.
textByHashes.1b0903c8202a0680d3f4ad984f41bf22ecd0689c: They're not easy to come by... and I believe you already have one?
textByHashes.c07e0ee32db008ed48ebc30ad3713470de715746: Good day to you. What can I get you to drink?
textByHashes.839586e00ce7d028b0fc74b6e3d3eaf95fd127af: Oh, another silly human come to have his mind melted? You should take that barcrawl card to Blurberry - he always likes to serve the Fire Toad Blast himself!
textByHashes.bad30efe6823f5495adeb836edc1571934864939: Oh, another silly human come to have her mind melted? You should take that barcrawl card to Blurberry - he always likes to serve the Fire Toad Blast himself!
textByHashes.4a4ab262a805ee78bc4bbf96a9b45416e710dd0f: Oh, another silly human come to have their mind melted? You should take that barcrawl card to Blurberry - he always likes to serve the Fire Toad Blast himself!
textByHashes.9ca665c7779007b99c2f013451c79380f6339f5a: Here, take a look at our menu.
textByHashes.cedfefb6aff8c7c85dc170b0b23e081d7e33a9c6: Sure thing, what did you want?
textByHashes.19a94aee58296aa7356b9fccbf1648e242d68f6a: And what will it be for you, fine friend?
textByHashes.a096a0fbab9b55b96d93d9758f67439331e9e155: Here you go. One delicious pint of beer.
textByHashes.2bca2a83006f70be755fcd6faa457a7b53179b16: It'll be yours for just 2 gold coins!
textByHashes.b30ad45ebb5f42c495576369388ae66d38747f01: One dwarven stout, best in all of Keldagrim!
textByHashes.c026891faa723d51b8a504697a8692fa1098a550: Ah, I see you have taste! A jug of wine will cost you 10 gold coins.
textByHashes.b914c5ed4ec7608d081e5f3be2190d5a98f5becf: Welcome traveller, can I get you a drink or some food?
textByHashes.d0283ead26ccd0cc550a73f9208c83b1629ce7cc: I can make you a stew for 20 gold coins.
